sourceSummary.oneLine: Development team document register listing technical, design-change, user manual, software, risk, clinical, PMS, PMCF, PSUR, and conformity documents by control number, revision/date, model, and remarks.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports traceability of registered technical and design-change documents for Abyz Detector flat panel detector models and related regulatory submissions.
keyPoints: The register includes technical file documents for HAD1717MC/MG, HAD1417MCW, HAD1717MCW, A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW, and HnX-P1.

Registered document types include design and development records, risk management plans/reports, usability records, clinical evaluation records, software validation, DICOM conformance statements, labeling/packaging, declarations of conformity, PMS, PSUR, and PMCF records.
The source includes QMS numbering guidance from AQP402, revision number 3, revised 2020.03.26, defining TCF as technical document and Abyz Detector as Flat Panel Detector item class 5.

evidence.claim: The document is a development team document register.
evidence.evidenceText: (개발팀) 문 서 등 록 대 장

evidence.claim: The form identifier and revision shown for the register is APF402-1(REV.0).
The register tracks control number, document name, issuing team, initial revision/date, revised revision/date, confirmation, discontinuation date, applicable model, and remarks.
evidence.evidenceText: 관 리 번 호,문 서 (자 료) 명,발 행 처(팀),제정 Rev.,제정일자,개정 Rev.,개정일자,확 인,폐지일자,확 인,적용 모델,비 고

evidence.claim: TCF is defined as technical documentation in the numbering guide.
QI is defined as other documentation in the numbering guide.
Abyz Detector is identified as a Flat Panel Detector item class.
Model classification A corresponds to HAD1717MC/MG for development design-change numbering.
Model classification B corresponds to HAD1417MCW for development design-change numbering.
The source registers CE-oriented, FDA-oriented, and KGMP-oriented product standard documents.
evidence.evidenceText: 제품 표준서 (CE향); 제품 표준서 (FDA향); 제품 표준서 (KGMP향)

evidence.claim: The source registers EU Declaration of Conformity for A1417MCW/A1717MCW/F1417MCW.
The source registers PMS, PSUR, PMCF plan, and PMCF evaluation report records for A1417MCW/A1717MCW/F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: Post-market Surveillance Plan; Periodic Safety Update Report; PMCF Plan; PMCF Evaluation Report

evidence.claim: The source registers EN 62220-1-1 DQE test reports.
The source registers software 62304 checklist documents.

reviewFlags.reason: Overall document date is not explicitly stated in the source text; the filename contains 20250611 but this was not used as documentDate.
Authority or jurisdiction is inferred from document names such as MFDS 제출, KGMP향, FDA향, CE향, and EU Declaration of Conformity; the register itself is not issued by a regulator.
The source is a preprocessed spreadsheet/CSV-like text with many blank columns and some malformed dates such as 1/1/00, 2023-05-XX, and 2024-09-00.
Some rows contain apparent model typos or inconsistent model strings, including HAD171MC/MG versus HAD1717MC/MG and A1417MW/F1417MW versus A1417MCW/F1417MCW.
